description:
Replace session-history scraping and hopeful bullet parsing with explicit plan sources.

Scope:
- point `/bw adopt` at a real markdown proposal/plan instead of recent conversation text
- make the source of truth explicit and reviewable by the human
- remove reliance on brittle formatting assumptions from live chat
- preserve a usable preview/review step grounded in the supplied document, not guessed context
title: Accept explicit markdown plans/proposals as `/bw adopt` input
